beforeSubmitPrompt.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks cursor before-submit-prompt || exit 0'

sessionEnd.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks cursor session-end || exit 0'

sessionStart.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks cursor session-start || exit 0'

stop.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks cursor stop || exit 0'

subagentStop.command: sh -c 'command -v mainline >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec mainline hooks cursor subagent-stop || exit 0'
